title: dortmanna retrorsa
intro: Dortmanna retrorsa, also known as the Dortmann's or Bristle Clubmoss, is a type of vascular plant that belongs to the lycopodiophyta class. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Dortmanna retrorsa include its ability to soothe coughs, reduce inflammation, and promote overall respiratory health. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and can also be used in poultices or topical creams to alleviate skin irritations.
